triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, incubate 4. (Create an Incubator token with four +1/+1 counters on it and "{2}: Transform this artifact." It transforms into a 0/0 Phyrexian artifact creature.)
Whenever a permanent you control transforms or a permanent you control enters transformed, you may draw a card. Do this only once each turn.
